matcher_value: if(Get-WinEvent -ListLog 'Microsoft-Windows-FailoverClustering/Operational' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue){Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='Microsoft-Windows-FailoverClustering/Operational'; StartTime=(Get-Date).AddDays(-30)} -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Message -match '(?i)cluster|resource status|unknown|offline|online|error' } | Select-Object -First 100 TimeCreated,Id,LevelDisplayName,@{N='Message';E={($_.Message -replace '\r?\n',' ')}} | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4}else{'Failover Clustering log not present on this PC (Windows 11 is typically not a local WSFC node).'}
